-    opts.redirect.err.type = reproc::redirect::type::pipe;
+    opts.redirect.err.type = reproc::redirect::type::pipe;  // capture stderr

     if (auto ec = proc.start(argv, opts)) {
         out.spawn_error = ec.message();
diff --git a/src/cmds/git.cpp b/src/cmds/git.cpp
index abc1234..def5678 100644
--- a/src/cmds/git.cpp
+++ b/src/cmds/git.cpp
@@ -50,6 +50,12 @@ namespace internal {

 namespace {

+bool any_arg_equals(const std::vector<std::string>& args, std::string_view target) {
+    for (const auto& a : args) {
+        if (a == target) return true;
+    }
+    return false;
+}
+
 bool starts_with(const std::string& s, const std::string& p) {
     return s.size() >= p.size() && std::equal(p.begin(), p.end(), s.begin());
 }

         while (!lines.empty() && lines.front().empty()) lines.erase(lines.begin());
         if (lines.empty()) continue;

         std::ostringstream commit;
+        // Headline only
         commit << mtk::core::utils::truncate(lines.front(), header_width);

         std::size_t body_emitted = 0;
